message:
test(shell): add protocol integration tests

Add integration tests that verify the full Open->Data->Resize->Exit
flow using net.Pipe() as a fake connection. Tests the protocol
without needing actual vsock or PTY.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
